name: Marcus Kingswell
bio: With over 15 years in South East London property, Marcus founded Kingswell to bring luxury agency standards to Catford, Lee, and Hither Green.

name: Sophie Hartley
bio: Sophie leads our sales team with exceptional market knowledge and a track record of achieving premium prices for our clients.

name: Daniel Okafor
bio: Daniel ensures seamless lettings experiences for landlords and tenants, with expertise in compliance and property management.

name: Amelia Torres
bio: Amelia's calm, confident approach and deep local connections make her one of the most trusted negotiators in the area.
